control_gap_policy: The 20 Phase 5.6 gap rows are controls; do not add source-ledger/public-date-reconstruction entries for them unless future cited public evidence proves the row itself is a public operation.
no_overclaim_boundary: No source-ledger or public-date-reconstruction field is upgraded by this artifact.
